extortion.description: CNQC was established in 1952, which mainly engaged in domestic and international construction projects and investment, real estatedevelopment, capital management, logistics, design consulting and etc.We are ready to upload more than 90 GB of essential corporate documents such as: driver licenses, employees medical forms, financial data (audits, payment details, reports), rental agreements, contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, employments passport with fingerprints, etc.
